/usr/bin/cc  -Wall -O3 -std=c99 -Wno-implicit-function-declaration -D_DARWIN_C_SOURCE -O3 -DNDEBUG -arch arm64 -dynamiclib -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names -current_version 3.99.5 -o libmp3lame.3.99.5.dylib -install_name @rpath/libmp3lame.0.dylib CMakeFiles/mp3lame.dir/libmp3lame/VbrTag.c.o CMakeFiles/mp3lame.dir/libmp3lame/bitstream.c.o CMakeFiles/mp3lame.dir/libmp3lame/encoder.c.o CMakeFiles/mp3lame.dir/libmp3lame/fft.c.o CMakeFiles/mp3lame.dir/libmp3lame/gain_analysis.c.o CMakeFiles/mp3lame.dir/libmp3lame/id3tag.c.o CMakeFiles/mp3lame.dir/libmp3lame/lame.c.o CMakeFiles/mp3lame.dir/libmp3lame/newmdct.c.o CMakeFiles/mp3lame.dir/libmp3lame/presets.c.o CMakeFiles/mp3lame.dir/libmp3lame/psymodel.c.o CMakeFiles/mp3lame.dir/libmp3lame/quantize.c.o CMakeFiles/mp3lame.dir/libmp3lame/quantize_pvt.c.o CMakeFiles/mp3lame.dir/libmp3lame/reservoir.c.o CMakeFiles/mp3lame.dir/libmp3lame/set_get.c.o CMakeFiles/mp3lame.dir/libmp3lame/tables.c.o CMakeFiles/mp3lame.dir/libmp3lame/takehiro.c.o CMakeFiles/mp3lame.dir/libmp3lame/util.c.o CMakeFiles/mp3lame.dir/libmp3lame/vbrquantize.c.o CMakeFiles/mp3lame.dir/libmp3lame/version.c.o CMakeFiles/mp3lame.dir/libmp3lame/mpglib_interface.c.o  -lm libmpgdecoder.a liblamevector.a
